title: Mandatory tax adviser registration with HMRC
body: "Tax advisers who interact with HMRC on behalf of clients will be legally required to register and meet minimum standards before doing so.  This will begin in May 2026, with a transitional period of at least 3 months for all tax adviser groups.  HMRC will communicate the changes and provide guidance in advance. A digital registration process will be available, with a non-digital alternative for those who are digitally excluded. "
